proofs.control: Tier access rules are explicitly defined
proofs.notes: 6 tiers with explicit access surfaces defined in TIER_ACCESS map. Each tier has enumerated valid transitions with reasons. Pure domain logic (no I/O). Authority: MEMBER_ROLE_ACCESS_AUTHORITY.md.

trial→capper (invalid).rejection: Transition from 'trial' to 'capper' is not allowed. Valid targets: free, vip, vip-plus, operator

evidence.expiry_service: trial-expiry-service.ts — runTrialExpiryPass scans for expired trials, deactivates with audit
evidence.expiry_scheduler: index.ts — trial expiry runs on schedule

proofs.notes: Trial FSM: free→trial (start), trial→free (expiry), trial→vip/vip-plus (convert). Invalid transitions rejected (trial→capper: "Transition from 'trial' to 'capper' is not allowed. Valid targets: free, vip, vip-plus, operator"). 7-day duration, automated expiry via runTrialExpiryPass. 0 trial rows in DB.

evidence.enforcement_mechanism: hasAccess(tier, surface) in member-lifecycle.ts checks TIER_ACCESS map
gate_points: API routes check authenticated tier before serving content
Discord bot checks member tier before posting to channels
Distribution service validates promotion target against tier access
evidence.pure_enforcement: Access check is pure domain logic — no bypass path without tier change

proofs.notes: Feature access enforced via hasAccess() in pure domain logic. TIER_ACCESS map defines exact surfaces per tier. No bypass path — access requires tier upgrade through FSM. API routes and Discord bot both gate on tier.

proofs.control: Subscription state is consistent across system

evidence.single_source_of_truth: member_tiers table — all tier state lives here
consistency_mechanisms: changed_by tracks who made the change
Audit log records all tier changes
evidence.no_dual_source: No separate subscription system — member_tiers is canonical

proofs.notes: member_tiers is the single source of truth for subscription state. 0 rows, 0 active, 0 inactive. FSM enforces valid transitions. All changes audited with changed_by attribution.
